item.title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: simplexchat
item.itunes:summary:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.description:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]

item.title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]
item.description:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS GRAPHIC RENDERINGS
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GS Graphic Renderings Tweak is a powerful tool designed to enhance the graphic rendering capabilities of Android devices. With this tweak, users have the freedom to choose between three advanced rendering options: OpenGL ES, Sikagl, and VulkanSika.
OpenGL ES, a widely-used graphics API, provides a solid foundation for rendering graphics on Android devices. It offers a high level of compatibility and performance, ensuring smooth and visually appealing graphics for gaming and multimedia applications.

Sikagl, an innovative rendering framework, introduces cutting-edge features and optimizations to deliver stunning visuals. With Sikagl, users can experience enhanced shading, lighting, and special effects, pushing the boundaries of graphic rendering on their Android devices.

VulkanSika, a modern and efficient graphics API, takes advantage of the latest hardware capabilities to deliver unparalleled performance and visual fidelity. By leveraging multi-threading and low-level hardware control, VulkanSika optimizes resource utilization and provides a smooth and responsive user experience, especially for graphically-intensive applications.

With the GS Graphic Renderings Tweak, users can seamlessly switch between these rendering options based on their preferences and specific application requirements. Whether they seek compatibility, advanced features, or maximum performance, this tweak empowers users to unlock the full potential of their Android devices and enjoy a customized and immersive graphical experience.
[read more]

item.itunes:author: quotexvip

QVip
(Database)

item.title: ZRAM - RAM DRIVE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: ZRAM - RAM DRIVE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
ZRAM - RAM DRIVE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
LETS INCREASE RAM (Z RAM)
DISABLE ZRAM
4GB ZRAM
6GB ZRAM
8GB ZRAM
10GB ZRAM

The Zram Rm Drive Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the performance of Android devices by increasing the available virtual RAM, also known as swap space. This module utilizes Zram technology, which compresses and stores data in RAM, effectively expanding the amount of usable memory on the device.

With the Zram Rm Drive module installed via Magisk, users can significantly boost their device's multitasking capabilities and overall responsiveness. By allocating additional virtual RAM of up to 20 GB, this module enables smoother performance when running memory-intensive applications or performing tasks that require extensive memory resources.

The Zram Rm Drive module seamlessly integrates into the Magisk framework, allowing for easy installation and configuration without the need for complex system modifications. Once installed, users can enjoy the benefits of increased virtual RAM without compromising system stability or battery life.

Overall, the Zram Rm Drive Magisk module is an excellent choice for Android users looking to optimize their device's performance and take full advantage of available memory resources for a smoother and more responsive user experience.

Gaming on Android has never been more immersive and demanding, thanks to the ever-evolving mobile gaming industry. To achieve peak gaming performance, you need the right tools, and that's where the RAM Drive Magisk Module comes into play. Developed by the talented @revWhiteShadow and powered by GODSPEED MODE, this Magisk module takes your gaming experience to the next level by harnessing the power of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android). In this article, we'll explore how this module can supercharge your Android gaming adventure.
Understanding the Power of zRAM

Before diving into the RAM Drive Magisk Module, let's shed some light on zRAM. zRAM, often referred to as "compressed RAM," is a feature that compresses portions of your device's RAM, effectively expanding the available memory. This compression reduces the need for constant read/write operations to your device's storage, resulting in faster performance and improved multitasking capabilities. Essentially, zRAM acts as a bridge between RAM and storage, optimizing memory usage for a seamless user experience.
The RAM Drive Magisk Module: GODSPEED MODE
What Is It?

The RAM Drive Magisk Module is an ingenious creation by @revWhiteShadow, designed to leverage zRAM's capabilities for gaming enthusiasts. Powered by GODSPEED MODE, this module takes full advantage of zRAM to create a RAM disk, allowing you to load game data directly into memory. As a result, your games launch faster, load assets more swiftly, and experience minimal stutters during gameplay.
Key Features

Here are some compelling features that make the RAM Drive Magisk Module a must-have for gamers:

Faster Load Times: Games load almost instantly, reducing the wait time between launching the app and diving into the action.

Smoother Gameplay: Assets are preloaded into memory, reducing in-game stutter and enhancing overall gameplay fluidity.

Reduced I/O Operations: By minimizing read/write operations to your device's storage, this module helps extend the lifespan of your storage hardware.

Customization: You can fine-tune the module's settings to suit your device's capabilities and your gaming preferences.

How to Install the RAM Drive Magisk Module

Root Your Device: Ensure your Android device is rooted using Magisk.

Download the Module: Visit the official source for the RAM Drive Magisk Module. Download the module compatible with your device.

Open Magisk Manager: Launch Magisk Manager on your device.

Install Module: In Magisk Manager, tap on the "Modules" section. Then, click on the "+" button or the "Install from storage" option.

Select the Module: Browse to the location where you downloaded the RAM Drive Magisk Module and select it.

Reboot: After installation, reboot your device to activate the module.

Configure the Module: Once your device restarts, open the module's interface through Magisk Manager. Configure the settings to your liking.

Conclusion

The RAM Drive Magisk Module, powered by GODSPEED MODE and built upon the foundation of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android), unlocks the full potential of your Android device for gaming. With faster load times, smoother gameplay, and reduced strain on your device's storage, you'll experience gaming like never before. If you're passionate about mobile gaming and want to elevate your gaming performance, this Magisk module is a game-changer that shouldn't be overlooked. Install it, configure it, and immerse yourself in a world of uninterrupted gaming pleasure.
[read more]
item.description:
ZRAM - RAM DRIVE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
LETS INCREASE RAM (Z RAM)
DISABLE ZRAM
4GB ZRAM
6GB ZRAM
8GB ZRAM
10GB ZRAM

The Zram Rm Drive Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the performance of Android devices by increasing the available virtual RAM, also known as swap space. This module utilizes Zram technology, which compresses and stores data in RAM, effectively expanding the amount of usable memory on the device.

With the Zram Rm Drive module installed via Magisk, users can significantly boost their device's multitasking capabilities and overall responsiveness. By allocating additional virtual RAM of up to 20 GB, this module enables smoother performance when running memory-intensive applications or performing tasks that require extensive memory resources.

The Zram Rm Drive module seamlessly integrates into the Magisk framework, allowing for easy installation and configuration without the need for complex system modifications. Once installed, users can enjoy the benefits of increased virtual RAM without compromising system stability or battery life.

Overall, the Zram Rm Drive Magisk module is an excellent choice for Android users looking to optimize their device's performance and take full advantage of available memory resources for a smoother and more responsive user experience.

Gaming on Android has never been more immersive and demanding, thanks to the ever-evolving mobile gaming industry. To achieve peak gaming performance, you need the right tools, and that's where the RAM Drive Magisk Module comes into play. Developed by the talented @revWhiteShadow and powered by GODSPEED MODE, this Magisk module takes your gaming experience to the next level by harnessing the power of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android). In this article, we'll explore how this module can supercharge your Android gaming adventure.
Understanding the Power of zRAM

Before diving into the RAM Drive Magisk Module, let's shed some light on zRAM. zRAM, often referred to as "compressed RAM," is a feature that compresses portions of your device's RAM, effectively expanding the available memory. This compression reduces the need for constant read/write operations to your device's storage, resulting in faster performance and improved multitasking capabilities. Essentially, zRAM acts as a bridge between RAM and storage, optimizing memory usage for a seamless user experience.
The RAM Drive Magisk Module: GODSPEED MODE
What Is It?

The RAM Drive Magisk Module is an ingenious creation by @revWhiteShadow, designed to leverage zRAM's capabilities for gaming enthusiasts. Powered by GODSPEED MODE, this module takes full advantage of zRAM to create a RAM disk, allowing you to load game data directly into memory. As a result, your games launch faster, load assets more swiftly, and experience minimal stutters during gameplay.
Key Features

Here are some compelling features that make the RAM Drive Magisk Module a must-have for gamers:

Faster Load Times: Games load almost instantly, reducing the wait time between launching the app and diving into the action.

Smoother Gameplay: Assets are preloaded into memory, reducing in-game stutter and enhancing overall gameplay fluidity.

Reduced I/O Operations: By minimizing read/write operations to your device's storage, this module helps extend the lifespan of your storage hardware.

Customization: You can fine-tune the module's settings to suit your device's capabilities and your gaming preferences.

How to Install the RAM Drive Magisk Module

Root Your Device: Ensure your Android device is rooted using Magisk.

Download the Module: Visit the official source for the RAM Drive Magisk Module. Download the module compatible with your device.

Open Magisk Manager: Launch Magisk Manager on your device.

Install Module: In Magisk Manager, tap on the "Modules" section. Then, click on the "+" button or the "Install from storage" option.

Select the Module: Browse to the location where you downloaded the RAM Drive Magisk Module and select it.

Reboot: After installation, reboot your device to activate the module.

Configure the Module: Once your device restarts, open the module's interface through Magisk Manager. Configure the settings to your liking.

Conclusion

The RAM Drive Magisk Module, powered by GODSPEED MODE and built upon the foundation of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android), unlocks the full potential of your Android device for gaming. With faster load times, smoother gameplay, and reduced strain on your device's storage, you'll experience gaming like never before. If you're passionate about mobile gaming and want to elevate your gaming performance, this Magisk module is a game-changer that shouldn't be overlooked. Install it, configure it, and immerse yourself in a world of uninterrupted gaming pleasure.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ZRAM - RAM DRIVE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
LETS INCREASE RAM (Z RAM)
DISABLE ZRAM
4GB ZRAM
6GB ZRAM
8GB ZRAM
10GB ZRAM

The Zram Rm Drive Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the performance of Android devices by increasing the available virtual RAM, also known as swap space. This module utilizes Zram technology, which compresses and stores data in RAM, effectively expanding the amount of usable memory on the device.

With the Zram Rm Drive module installed via Magisk, users can significantly boost their device's multitasking capabilities and overall responsiveness. By allocating additional virtual RAM of up to 20 GB, this module enables smoother performance when running memory-intensive applications or performing tasks that require extensive memory resources.

The Zram Rm Drive module seamlessly integrates into the Magisk framework, allowing for easy installation and configuration without the need for complex system modifications. Once installed, users can enjoy the benefits of increased virtual RAM without compromising system stability or battery life.

Overall, the Zram Rm Drive Magisk module is an excellent choice for Android users looking to optimize their device's performance and take full advantage of available memory resources for a smoother and more responsive user experience.

To achieve peak gaming performance, you need the right tools, and that's where the RAM Drive Magisk Module comes into play. Developed by the talented @revWhiteShadow and powered by GODSPEED MODE, this Magisk module takes your gaming experience to the next level by harnessing the power of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android). Essentially, zRAM acts as a bridge between RAM and storage, optimizing memory usage for a seamless user experience.
The RAM Drive Magisk Module: GODSPEED MODE
What Is It?

The RAM Drive Magisk Module is an ingenious creation by @revWhiteShadow, designed to leverage zRAM's capabilities for gaming enthusiasts. Powered by GODSPEED MODE, this module takes full advantage of zRAM to create a RAM disk, allowing you to load game data directly into memory. As a result, your games launch faster, load assets more swiftly, and experience minimal stutters during gameplay.
Key Features

Here are some compelling features that make the RAM Drive Magisk Module a must-have for gamers:

Faster Load Times: Games load almost instantly, reducing the wait time between launching the app and diving into the action.

Smoother Gameplay: Assets are preloaded into memory, reducing in-game stutter and enhancing overall gameplay fluidity.

Reduced I/O Operations: By minimizing read/write operations to your device's storage, this module helps extend the lifespan of your storage hardware.

Customization: You can fine-tune the module's settings to suit your device's capabilities and your gaming preferences.

How to Install the RAM Drive Magisk Module

Root Your Device: Ensure your Android device is rooted using Magisk.

Download the Module: Visit the official source for the RAM Drive Magisk Module. Download the module compatible with your device.

Open Magisk Manager: Launch Magisk Manager on your device.

Install Module: In Magisk Manager, tap on the "Modules" section. Then, click on the "+" button or the "Install from storage" option.

Select the Module: Browse to the location where you downloaded the RAM Drive Magisk Module and select it.

Reboot: After installation, reboot your device to activate the module.

Configure the Module: Once your device restarts, open the module's interface through Magisk Manager. Configure the settings to your liking.

Conclusion

The RAM Drive Magisk Module, powered by GODSPEED MODE and built upon the foundation of zRAM (zram GitHub, zram Android), unlocks the full potential of your Android device for gaming. With faster load times, smoother gameplay, and reduced strain on your device's storage, you'll experience gaming like never before. If you're passionate about mobile gaming and want to elevate your gaming performance, this Magisk module is a game-changer that shouldn't be overlooked. Install it, configure it, and immerse yourself in a world of uninterrupted gaming pleasure.
[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]
item.description:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

[read more]

item.title: SeriousSamClassic-VK [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: SeriousSamClassic-VK [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: tx00100xt
item.itunes:summary:
SeriousSamClassic-VK
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic-VK is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic with Vulkan support, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports Vulkan and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the how to install section for more information.
[read more]
item.description:
SeriousSamClassic-VK
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic-VK is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic with Vulkan support, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports Vulkan and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the how to install section for more information.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SeriousSamClassic-VK
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic-VK is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic with Vulkan support, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports Vulkan and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the how to install section for more information.
[read more]

item.title: SeriousSamClassic [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: SeriousSamClassic [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: tx00100xt
item.itunes:summary:
SeriousSamClassic
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.3 and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.
[read more]
item.description:

SeriousSamClassic is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.3 and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SeriousSamClassic
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.3 and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
